# Longstake

> Longstake helps businesses in Toronto and worldwide with websites, mobile/web apps, managed Google and Meta ads, Google review management, and Facebook/Instagram/LinkedIn business profile setup. Monthly plans from $9.99/mo CAD.

Canonical site: https://longstake.ca
Pricing: https://longstake.ca/pricing
Contact: layla@longstake.ca | +1 (437) 878-0203

## Primary services

- Website design, development, and redesign (Silver, Gold plans)
- Mobile and web app development (Platinum plan)
- Managed Google Ads (PPC) — campaign setup, optimization, reporting
- Managed Meta Ads — Facebook and Instagram advertising
- Google review management — monitoring and automated responses
- Social profile setup — Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn business pages

## Region

Home base: Scarborough, Toronto, Ontario, Canada (remote / service-area business)
Primary market: Toronto, Ontario, Canada (GTA)
Also serves: Scarborough, North York, Mississauga, Brampton, Markham, Vaughan, Etobicoke, Richmond Hill, Oakville, and worldwide (remote)

## Pricing (CAD / month)

| Plan     | Price   | Best for                                              |
|----------|---------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| Silver   | $9.99   | New or redesigned website + reviews + social links    |
| Gold     | $39.99  | Dynamic site + managed Google & Meta ads + analytics  |
| Platinum | $99.99  | Mobile or web app + full growth stack                 |

Free setup on Silver and Gold; Platinum setup quoted per project.
Full details: https://longstake.ca/pricing

facebook business page setup, instagram business profile setup, linkedin business page setup, social media setup Toronto,

## Structured data

Organization and Service schema on all pages; OfferCatalog with plan prices on /pricing.

## Do not infer

- Longstake is not a hardware or investor-matchmaking company (legacy positioning removed).
- Stakenex and Stakeflow are retired brands; all services are under Longstake at longstake.ca.
